org.docgene.model

Interface ListElement

  • All Superinterfaces:
    org.docgene.model.conditions.ConditionElement<ListElement>, ParagraphElement, StyledElement
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    XMLList, XMLListItem

    public interface ListElement
extends ParagraphElement, org.docgene.model.conditions.ConditionElement<ListElement>
    Represent any element which can be included in a list. The allowed elements are:
    • "ul" and "ol" lists
    • "li" list elements

    • Field Summary

      • Fields inherited from interface org.docgene.model.StyledElement

        TYPE_NONE

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods Default Methods
